name: TheBigBrother

descFull: The Big Brother V5.0 is a weaponized OSINT platform featuring username enumeration (473+ platforms), quad-vector visual intelligence, Sky Radar tracking, crypto wallet analysis, SSL intelligence, digital footprint reconstruction, EXIF extraction, advanced dorking, and network reconnaissance.
